proposal1.heroHeadline: Complete is losing 30 hours a month on manual proposals. Let's change that.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, proposals are manual and time-consuming. Automate and complete them in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the ongoing losses you are facing without realizing.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Each proposal takes 4 hours to draft. With 7 employees, that's 28 hours a week not spent on strategic tasks.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean clients move on. A 10% loss in conversion can cost you $50,000 annually.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manual efforts lead to inconsistent branding. This confuses clients and results in a 5% drop in trust, costing $15,000 in lost opportunities.

problems.title: High Error Rate
problems.description: Human errors in proposals cost you credibility. Each mistake leads to a 3% drop in client retention, risking $12,000 in revenue.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: Proposal creation ties up 2 employees full-time. This is $80,000 a year spent on non-billable hours.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: Competitors using automation respond faster. This delay costs you a potential 15% market share.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Replace inefficiency with instant proposal generation.

solutions.title: Instant Drafts
solutions.description: Manually drafting proposals is slow. Our system generates them instantly, saving you time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Current methods risk inconsistency. Our system ensures every proposal aligns with your brand.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual errors hurt your image. Automated proposals eliminate mistakes, enhancing reliability.

solutions.title: Resource Optimization
solutions.description: Staff time is wasted on proposals. Automation frees them for higher-value tasks.

solutions.title: Competitive Edge
solutions.description: Manual processes slow you down. Gain an edge with rapid, automated responses.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Complete's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Complete around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Complete.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Brand with Complete's Proven Marketing Strategies
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a comprehensive marketing strategy to enhance your brand's visibility and drive growth through targeted campaigns.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant revenue losses due to missed opportunities.

problems.title: Low Online Engagement
problems.description: Every unengaged visitor is potential revenue lost. Current website traffic is not converting, resulting in a 30% drop in potential sales.

problems.title: Ineffective Advertising Spend
problems.description: Without optimized ads, advertising dollars are wasted. This leads to a 25% higher cost per acquisition than industry standards.

problems.title: Weak Brand Recognition
problems.description: Inconsistent branding results in lower trust and recognition, causing a 15% decrease in customer retention rates.

problems.title: Poor Social Media Impact
problems.description: Underutilized social channels lead to a lack of engagement, with a 40% decrease in follower growth over the past year.

problems.title: Limited Market Insights
problems.description: Without proper analytics, decisions are made blindly, causing a 20% slower response to market changes and trends.

problems.title: Unoptimized Content Strategy
problems.description: Content that does not resonate with your audience results in a 35% lower click-through rate on digital platforms.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions directly address these challenges to transform your business.

solutions.title: Digital Marketing Strategy
solutions.description: We create targeted campaigns to improve online engagement and conversion rates.

solutions.title: Brand Development
solutions.description: Our team enhances your brand identity for stronger market presence and customer loyalty.

solutions.title: Market Analytics
solutions.description: We provide in-depth insights to ensure data-driven decision-making and strategic adjustments.

solutions.title: Content Creation
solutions.description: Our content strategies are designed to captivate your audience and increase engagement.

metrics.label: Increase in online conversion rates projected.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Complete is the trusted partner you need to overcome these challenges.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our team has a track record of delivering results across various industries.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your business goals and tailor our strategies to meet your specific needs.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We employ cutting-edge strategies to keep your brand ahead of the competition.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Insights
whyUsCards.description: Our strategies are backed by comprehensive data analysis for optimal outcomes.

socialProof.label: Average client growth in first year.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to driving your success.

team.name: Brian Cross
team.bio: Brian leads strategy and client relationships, ensuring every project aligns with business objectives.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery Phase
process.description: We dive deep into your business to understand your challenges and goals.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: We craft a personalized strategy to address your specific needs.

process.title: Execution

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's explore how we can work together to achieve your goals. No commitment required.
